what_it_is: A short, concrete description of the product or slice.
why_it_matters: Why this outcome is worth building now.
outcome: The result the product must create.
risks: material product, technical, security or operational risk
authority: Who may approve scope, execution, release or waiver.
data_and_metrics: success metric or risk metric that matters
compliance_privacy: privacy, legal, license or compliance note
cost_relevance: No material spend, or named budget/cost boundary.
operations_expected: how the product is expected to run or be supported
open_decisions: decision that is not closed yet
